packages.title: Microsoft Azure AI Fundamentals (AZ-901)
packages.description: This package covers fundamental AI concepts, including fairness, safety, privacy, and explainability, along with matching AI tasks to relevant Azure AI models.

packages.title: Microsoft AI Transformation Leader (AB-731)
packages.description: This package covers the business value, capabilities, adoption strategies, and core concepts of Generative AI solutions within the Microsoft Azure ecosystem.

packages.title: Text Mining II
packages.description: A collection of sample questions mirroring the structure and content of the 2024 Exam TM.

packages.title: Text Mining I
packages.description: This package contains sample questions covering topics such as ambiguity in natural language, the self-attention mechanism, lemmatization, and NLP pipeline steps using Transformers.
